technology.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman face off in court over OpenAI’s founding mission
technology.summary: Musk’s lawsuit accuses Altman of fraud, while OpenAI says that Musk is ‘motivated by jealousy’ A lawsuit between two of Silicon Valley’s biggest tycoons goes to trial Monday in California, the culmination of a years-long bitter feud. Elon Musk has accused Sam Altman of betraying the founding agreement of the non-profit they started together, OpenAI, by changing it to a for-profit enterprise. Musk accuses Altman, OpenAI , its president Greg Brockman, and its major partner Microsoft of breach of contract and unjust enrichment in the lawsuit. Jury selection is scheduled to begin Monday morning at a federal courthouse in Oakland, with opening arguments from both sides expected later this week. The trial is slated to last two to three weeks. Along with internal communications from Musk and key executives at OpenAI, the trial promises a who’s who of Silicon Valley on the witness stand, including Musk, Altman and Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Musk’s lawsuit accuses Altman of fraud, while OpenAI says that Musk is ‘motivated by jealousy’ A lawsuit between two of Silicon Valley’s biggest tycoons goes to trial Monday in California, the culmination of a years-long bitter feud. Elon Musk has accused Sam Altman of betraying the founding agreement of the non-profit they started together, OpenAI, by changing it to a for-profit enterprise. Musk accuses Altman, OpenAI , its president Greg Brockman, and its major partner Microsoft of breach of contract and unjust enrichment in the lawsuit. Jury selection is scheduled to begin Monday morning at a federal courthouse in Oakland, with opening arguments from both sides expected later this week. The trial is slated to last two to three weeks. Along with internal communications from Musk and key executives at OpenAI, the trial promises a who’s who of Silicon Valley on the witness stand, including Musk, Altman and Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Elon Musk與Sam Altman之間的法律訴訟於加州開庭，這場訴訟源於Musk指控Altman背叛他們共同創立的非營利機構OpenAI的創始使命，並將其轉變為營利企業。Musk在訴訟中指控Altman、OpenAI總裁Greg Brockman及其主要合作夥伴微軟違反合約及不當得利。陪審團選擇將於周一早上開始，雙方的開庭陳述預計在本周晚些時候進行，整個審理過程預計持續兩到三週。
briefing.background: OpenAI成立於2015年，最初的使命是促進人工智慧的安全發展，並確保其利益惠及全人類。隨著時間推移，OpenAI逐漸轉型為營利模式，這引發了創始人之間的分歧。Musk對此變化表示不滿，認為這背離了最初的宗旨，並對Altman的領導方式提出質疑。微軟作為OpenAI的主要合作夥伴，對其商業化進程有著重要影響，這也使得該訴訟的結果可能會影響到未來的科技合作模式及人工智慧的發展方向。
briefing.analysis: Musk與Altman之間的法律對抗反映了科技界對於人工智慧商業化的不同看法。Musk認為OpenAI的轉型是對其創始理念的背叛，並指控Altman及其團隊不當獲利，這顯示出他對於企業道德的強烈關注。而Altman則可能會主張，商業化是確保OpenAI持續發展和資金支持的必要步驟。微軟的參與使得這場訴訟更加複雜，因為其在OpenAI的商業模式中扮演了關鍵角色。隨著審理的進行，科技界的目光將集中於這場訴訟的結果，可能會對未來的人工智慧發展及其商業模式產生深遠影響。

technology.title: China blocks Meta’s Manus deal after months-long probe, thwarting purchase
technology.summary: Beijing has blocked the proposed purchase by Meta Platforms of artificial intelligence firm Manus, a start-up that is officially registered in Singapore but developed its products in mainland China. The National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC), the country’s top economic planner, announced the ruling in a statement on Monday, and asked the parties involved in the deal to cancel the transaction. Neither Meta nor Manus immediately responded to a request for comment on Monday. A...

briefing.news_focus: Beijing has blocked the proposed purchase by Meta Platforms of artificial intelligence firm Manus, a start-up that is officially registered in Singapore but developed its products in mainland China. The National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC), the country’s top economic planner, announced the ruling in a statement on Monday, and asked the parties involved in the deal to cancel the transaction. Neither Meta nor Manus immediately responded to a request for comment on Monday. A...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國政府已經阻止了Meta Platforms收購人工智慧公司Manus的提案。這項交易經過數月的調查後，由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）於週一宣布，要求相關方取消交易。Manus是一家在新加坡註冊的初創公司，但其產品的開發是在中國大陸進行的。Meta和Manus目前尚未對此做出回應。
briefing.background: 此次交易的阻止反映了中國對外資企業在本國科技產業的監管趨嚴。隨著中國政府加強對科技行業的控制，特別是在人工智慧和數據安全領域，外資企業的併購行為面臨越來越多的挑戰。Manus作為一家在中國開發產品的公司，其收購案引發了中國當局對於技術流失和國家安全的擔憂。這一決策可能會影響Meta在中國市場的長期戰略，因為中國是全球最大的科技市場之一。
stakeholders: 中國國家發展和改革委員會
briefing.analysis: 中國政府的決定顯示出其對於外資企業進入本土市場的高度警惕，特別是在涉及敏感技術的情況下。Meta的收購計劃本意在於擴展其在人工智慧領域的實力，但此舉卻遭遇了中國的強烈反對。這一情況可能會導致Meta在未來的投資計劃中更加謹慎，並重新評估其在中國的業務策略。此外，這也可能促使其他外資企業在考慮進入中國市場時，對當地的政策環境進行更深入的分析。由於目前沒有其他報導提供進一步的細節，未來的發展仍需密切關注。

technology.title: Eutelsat CEO says US demand holds despite SpaceX push to curb European rivals - Reuters
technology.summary: Eutelsat CEO says US demand holds despite SpaceX push to curb European rivals Reuters

briefing.news_focus: Eutelsat CEO says US demand holds despite SpaceX push to curb European rivals Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: Eutelsat的首席執行官表示，儘管SpaceX正在推動減少對歐洲競爭對手的需求，但美國市場的需求仍然穩定。這表明在美國市場上，Eutelsat仍然能夠保持其業務的穩定性，儘管面臨來自SpaceX的競爭壓力。
briefing.background: Eutelsat是一家總部位於法國的衛星運營商，專注於提供廣播和數據服務。隨著SpaceX的Starlink計劃在全球範圍內擴展，特別是在美國市場，Eutelsat及其他歐洲衛星運營商面臨著日益激烈的競爭。SpaceX的低軌道衛星技術使其能夠提供更快的網絡連接，這對傳統的衛星運營商構成挑戰。Eutelsat的CEO的發言強調了該公司在美國市場的持續需求，顯示出其在面對競爭時的韌性。
briefing.analysis: Eutelsat的CEO強調美國市場需求的穩定，這可能反映出該公司在特定客戶群體中的優勢，尤其是在傳統廣播和數據服務領域。然而，SpaceX的推進可能會對未來的市場格局產生影響，特別是在提供更具競爭力的價格和服務方面。Eutelsat需要持續創新以應對這一挑戰，並可能需要考慮與其他技術公司的合作來增強其市場地位。儘管目前美國需求穩定，但未來的競爭動態仍需密切關注，尤其是SpaceX的進一步擴展可能會對Eutelsat造成壓力。

politics.title: G7 central banks poised to hold borrowing costs amid concerns over prolonged Iran war
politics.summary: Critical week for global economy as banks expected to issue warnings over conflict driving up prices Business live – latest updates The world’s most powerful central banks are poised to hold borrowing costs unchanged this week amid growing concerns over the unfolding inflation shock from the Iran war. In a critical week for the global economy, each of the central banks in the G7 are expected to issue warnings over the risks from the Middle East war driving up prices for households and businesses. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Critical week for global economy as banks expected to issue warnings over conflict driving up prices Business live – latest updates The world’s most powerful central banks are poised to hold borrowing costs unchanged this week amid growing concerns over the unfolding inflation shock from the Iran war. In a critical week for the global economy, each of the central banks in the G7 are expected to issue warnings over the risks from the Middle East war driving up prices for households and businesses. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 七大工業國（G7）的中央銀行預計將在本週保持借貸成本不變，原因是對於伊朗戰爭可能導致的持續通脹衝擊的擔憂日益加劇。這一決策將在全球經濟中引發重要影響，各大中央銀行預計將發出警告，指出中東戰爭對家庭和企業價格的風險。
briefing.background: 目前，伊朗戰爭的持續進展對全球經濟造成了顯著影響，特別是在通脹方面。隨著戰爭的延續，能源和原材料價格的上漲對各國的經濟復甦形成了挑戰。G7國家面對的情況更加複雜，因為他們需要在支持經濟增長和控制通脹之間找到平衡。此外，根據參考報導，來自中國的支持也可能使伊朗在這場衝突中獲得更大的影響力，進一步加劇地緣政治的緊張局勢。
briefing.analysis: G7中央銀行的決策反映了對伊朗戰爭的深切關注，尤其是其對全球通脹的潛在影響。各國央行在保持利率不變的同時，必須考慮如何應對因戰爭而上升的生活成本與企業支出。參考報導指出，伊朗戰爭已經干擾了電路板供應鏈，這對科技公司造成了新的打擊，尤其是在記憶體芯片價格已經高漲的背景下，這進一步突顯了戰爭的廣泛影響。不同報導的重點在於，The Diplomat強調了中國對伊朗的支持，而The Hindu International則專注於戰爭對供應鏈的具體影響，這顯示出各方在解讀戰爭影響時的不同視角。

supporting_titles: Helping Iran, China Is a Party in the War
Iran war disrupts the circuit board supply chain, raises costs for tech firms
supporting_summaries: Several reports in recent weeks have revealed the extent of China’s active support for Iran.
The disruption is a fresh blow to electronics manufacturers which are already grappling with soaring memory chip ‌costs and highlights the broadening impact of the Iran war

politics.title: China equities set for boost as Trump-Xi meeting raises hopes of thaw
politics.summary: The long-anticipated state visit by US President Donald Trump to China next month could lift sentiment in mainland and Hong Kong equities, as investors bet that easing tensions between Beijing and Washington will support export-driven sectors and companies pursuing overseas expansion. Trump is scheduled to meet President Xi Jinping on May 14-15, with discussions expected to cover tariffs, purchases of US goods and restrictions on rare earths. Any progress could clear a path for Chinese firms to...

briefing.news_focus: The long-anticipated state visit by US President Donald Trump to China next month could lift sentiment in mainland and Hong Kong equities, as investors bet that easing tensions between Beijing and Washington will support export-driven sectors and companies pursuing overseas expansion. Trump is scheduled to meet President Xi Jinping on May 14-15, with discussions expected to cover tariffs, purchases of US goods and restrictions on rare earths. Any progress could clear a path for Chinese firms to...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普預定於下個月訪問中國，這一長期期待的國事訪問可能提升中國內地及香港股市的情緒。投資者預期，若中美之間的緊張關係緩解，將有助於出口導向的行業及尋求海外擴張的公司。特朗普與中國國家主席習近平的會談將於5月14日至15日舉行，預計將討論關稅、美國商品購買及稀土限制等議題。
briefing.background: 中美兩國在貿易、科技及地緣政治上存在持續的緊張關係，特別是在關稅及科技領域的競爭。特朗普的訪問被視為可能緩解這些緊張的契機，尤其是在中國經濟面臨下行壓力的背景下。投資者對於中美貿易的未來走向充滿期待，尤其是對於出口導向的行業，如製造業及科技公司，這些行業將受益於更為友好的貿易環境。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普與習近平的會晤可能成為中美關係的一個轉折點，若雙方能在貿易及科技問題上達成共識，將有助於穩定市場情緒並促進投資。然而，參考報導指出，美國國務院近期對中國企業，特別是DeepSeek等公司提出了有關人工智慧竊取的指控，這顯示出美方在科技領域的警惕性仍然高漲。這種矛盾的情況可能使得雙方在會談中面臨更多挑戰，尤其是在涉及知識產權及科技安全的議題上。因此，雖然市場對於特朗普訪問的預期樂觀，但實際進展仍需觀察。

supporting_titles: U.S. State Department orders global warning about alleged AI thefts by DeepSeek, other Chinese firms
supporting_summaries: The White House accusations and the cable come just weeks before ‌U.S. President Donald Trump is set to visit Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing

politics.title: Iran Foreign Minister arrives in Russia as U.S. talks remain stalled
politics.summary: Russian and Iranian state media confirmed Mr. Araghchi’s talks with Putin, citing officials from their respective governments

briefing.news_focus: Russian and Iranian state media confirmed Mr. Araghchi’s talks with Putin, citing officials from their respective governments
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗外長阿巴斯·阿拉赫奇抵達俄羅斯，與普京進行會談。這一行動是在美國與伊朗的談判陷入停滯之際進行的，俄羅斯和伊朗的國家媒體均確認了此次會談的消息。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的核談判自2021年以來一直處於僵局，主要因為雙方在制裁和核計劃問題上的分歧。伊朗希望通過外交途徑重啟與西方的對話，而俄羅斯則在此背景下加強與伊朗的合作，以應對美國的影響力。俄羅斯與伊朗的關係在地緣政治上愈發緊密，尤其是在中東地區的戰略利益上。
briefing.analysis: 此次會談顯示伊朗在面對美國壓力時，尋求加強與俄羅斯的聯繫。阿拉赫奇的訪問可能旨在尋求俄方的支持，尤其是在美國制裁的背景下。參考報導補充指出，阿拉赫奇將與莫斯科的高級官員進行會談，這表明伊朗希望在多邊外交中尋求更多的支持與合作。不同報導的重點在於，主新聞強調了會談的時間背景，而參考報導則更著重於會談的具體對象，顯示出伊朗在外交上的靈活性與策略性。

supporting_titles: Iran’s foreign minister leaves Pakistan, heads to Russia for more talks
supporting_summaries: Abbas Araghchi will speak with 'senior officials' in Moscow, Iran's Foreign Ministry says.

economy.title: Oil prices rise as US-Iran peace talks stall
economy.summary: President Trump said the US had cancelled plans to send a team to Pakistan for negotiations.

briefing.news_focus: President Trump said the US had cancelled plans to send a team to Pakistan for negotiations.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國與伊朗的和平談判未能如期進行，導致油價上漲。美國總統特朗普宣布取消派遣團隊前往巴基斯坦進行談判的計劃，這一消息引發市場對未來供應的擔憂，進而推高布倫特原油價格超過2%。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係長期以來影響著全球油市。隨著美國對伊朗的制裁持續，兩國之間的和平談判成為市場關注的焦點。此次談判原定於巴基斯坦舉行，旨在尋求解決雙方的分歧，然而談判的失敗使得市場對未來油價的預期變得不明朗。油價的波動不僅影響生產國的經濟，也對全球能源市場造成影響，尤其是在需求逐漸回升的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 此次談判的失敗對於全球油市的影響顯而易見。根據參考報導，布倫特原油價格因為談判未能如期進行而上漲超過2%。這顯示出市場對於供應鏈穩定性的敏感度。美國和伊朗的立場差異仍然明顯，特朗普政府似乎對於與伊朗的交涉持保留態度，而伊朗則可能希望通過談判獲得更有利的條件。未來幾周，若談判仍未重啟，油價可能會持續受到影響，並可能引發其他地區的供應鏈問題。

supporting_titles: Oil prices rise amid stalled US-Iran peace talks
supporting_summaries: Brent crude rises more than 2 percent after Washington and Tehran fail to hold second round of talks in Pakistan.

economy.title: UK urged to deploy EU-style ‘trade bazooka’ against Trump’s tariffs
economy.summary: ‘Inadequate economic security’ is putting growth and jobs at risk, says British Chambers of Commerce UK business leaders have called on the government to build an EU-style “trade bazooka” to protect Britain’s economic interests in response to the latest tariff threats from Donald Trump. As transatlantic tensions rise, the British Chambers of Commerce said the UK’s “inadequate economic security” was putting growth and jobs at risk. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: ‘Inadequate economic security’ is putting growth and jobs at risk, says British Chambers of Commerce UK business leaders have called on the government to build an EU-style “trade bazooka” to protect Britain’s economic interests in response to the latest tariff threats from Donald Trump. As transatlantic tensions rise, the British Chambers of Commerce said the UK’s “inadequate economic security” was putting growth and jobs at risk. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國商會呼籲政府建立類似歐盟的“貿易大砲”，以應對唐納德·特朗普最新的關稅威脅。商會指出，英國目前的經濟安全不足，正危及增長和就業。隨著跨大西洋緊張局勢上升，商會強調必須採取行動以保護英國的經濟利益。
briefing.background: 英國在脫歐後面臨重新調整貿易政策的挑戰，特別是在與美國的貿易關係上。特朗普政府的關稅政策對英國企業造成了壓力，尤其是在製造業和出口領域。英國商會的呼籲反映了企業界對於政府在貿易政策上缺乏明確應對措施的擔憂，並希望能夠借鑒歐盟的成功經驗，制定出有效的貿易保護措施。
briefing.analysis: 英國商會的提議顯示出對於特朗普關稅政策的強烈反彈，並突顯了英國企業在當前經濟環境中的脆弱性。參考報導指出，特朗普的關稅政策可能促使企業尋找“中國加一”的替代供應鏈，這意味著企業可能會將生產轉移到其他國家以減少對中國的依賴。這一動態可能會影響英國的貿易策略，促使其尋求與其他國家的貿易協定以彌補因美國關稅政策造成的損失。各方對於如何應對特朗普的關稅政策存在不同看法，英國政府是否能夠迅速採取行動以保護國內經濟，將成為未來的重要觀察焦點。

supporting_titles: Who will win from Trump’s tariffs?
supporting_summaries: New rates mean new “China plus one” locations

economy.title: How the Middle East war is boosting family offices, private banking in Hong Kong and Asia
economy.summary: The Middle East war has created new opportunities for family offices and private banking businesses in Hong Kong and Asia, as wealthy investors in the region seek to diversify their investments away from the conflict zone, according to industry players. Ida Liu, CEO of HSBC Private Bank, said some affluent Middle Eastern customers were diversifying into Asia. The bank is the largest wealth manager in Asia with US$1.05 trillion in wealth balances in Asia last year, up 16.3 per cent from a year...

briefing.news_focus: The Middle East war has created new opportunities for family offices and private banking businesses in Hong Kong and Asia, as wealthy investors in the region seek to diversify their investments away from the conflict zone, according to industry players. Ida Liu, CEO of HSBC Private Bank, said some affluent Middle Eastern customers were diversifying into Asia. The bank is the largest wealth manager in Asia with US$1.05 trillion in wealth balances in Asia last year, up 16.3 per cent from a year...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中東戰爭促使香港及亞洲的家族辦公室和私人銀行業務蓬勃發展，因為該地區的富裕投資者尋求將投資多元化以避開衝突區。根據匯豐私人銀行首席執行官Ida Liu的說法，部分中東富裕客戶正在將資金轉向亞洲。匯豐在亞洲的財富管理業務去年達到1.05萬億美元的資產餘額，較前一年增長16.3%。
briefing.background: 中東地區的持續衝突對當地經濟造成了影響，促使富裕投資者尋求更安全的投資環境。香港作為亞洲金融中心，吸引了大量資本流入，尤其是在私人銀行和家族辦公室領域。這些機構專注於為高淨值客戶提供個性化的財務管理服務，並且隨著市場需求的增加，業務規模也在擴大。匯豐銀行作為亞洲最大的財富管理機構，正積極應對這一趨勢，並且在資產管理方面持續增長。
briefing.analysis: 中東戰爭的爆發使得香港及亞洲的家族辦公室和私人銀行業務迎來了新的機遇，這些機構正在吸引來自中東的富裕客戶。根據《經濟學人》的報導，香港的金融市場正在恢復活力，吸引更多交易和資本流入，這與中東客戶的資金轉移相輔相成。然而，根據《衛報》的報導，匯豐銀行正在檢討其在香港的員工福利政策，這可能會影響其吸引和留住人才的能力。這些不同的報導顯示出，儘管市場機會增多，但銀行內部的政策調整也可能對其長期業務發展產生影響。

supporting_titles: HSBC ‘reviewing’ private school perk for bankers in Hong Kong

supporting_summaries: Hundreds of senior staff in territory benefit from nearly £30,000-a-year grant per child not available to staff in group’s other hubs HSBC is reportedly reviewing a perk that covers school fees for bankers in Hong Kong as part of a big overhaul of the bank under chief executive Georges Elhedery. Europe’s largest bank is considering whether to scrap the perk for new employees or make changes to total compensation, Bloomberg News reported . No decisions have been made yet. Continue reading...
